name: restaurant CFOs managing 10-20 suppliers tool
description: For restaurant CFOs managing 10-20 suppliers, inaccurate demand forecasting causes excess inventory and waste. We provide inventory optimization software instead of manual inventory tracking and supplier negotiations.
